title: panicum neobathiei
intro: Panicum neobathiei is a species of grass native to China, classified under the family Poaceae. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Panicum neobathiei include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Panicum neobathiei include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
